'''Fwillsving''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] and [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]]. It was sometimes used by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] as a repair depot and a hideaway from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] patrol [[Starship/Legends|starships]] while smuggling [[Spice/Legends|spice]] on the [[Kessel Run/Legends|Kessel Run]].

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], its [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Svitalos]] was severely damaged by overzealous celebrants of a [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] victory over neighboring [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]].<ref name="HNN" />

{{Planet-stub}}
